title: Cracca richardiana

Within the Fabaceae family, Cracca richardiana is further classified within the subfamily Faboideae. Vicia cracca, also known as the bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial legume plant with a sprawling habit and distinctive bird's foot-shaped clusters of flowers. The health benefits of Vicia cracca include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Vicia cracca include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
